rationale: In the citing paper, Sridhar et al. (2011) is cited only once in a grouped parenthetical citation alongside Dorfman and Steiner (1954) and Lambin et al. (1975) when introducing the Dorfman-Steiner allocation condition. The paper does not engage the cited article's specific platform-firm framework, dynamic two-sided model, or empirical results. It serves as general background support for a well-known budgeting principle rather than as a distinct input to the citing paper's core model or contribution.
